final_prompt.prompt:
Create an educational knowledge card for children explaining the story of 赤壁之战 from the Three Kingdoms.

Style/medium: needs a cartoon-story illustration aesthetic suitable for children — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single large knowledge card layout with clear title area and bullet-point sidebar
Subject: must include the story of 赤壁之战 (赤壁之战)
Scene/backdrop: needs a cartoon-story visual treatment — exact scene selection is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a child-friendly, engaging atmosphere — exact tone balance is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant, child-appropriate direction — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "赤壁之战" (title, clear and prominent), with key story points listed alongside with punctuation
Constraints: must be a single knowledge card format, title must be clear and prominent, key points must be listed with punctuation in sidebar, cartoon-story visual style throughout
Avoid:
